name: Diapers
description: Mother is currently unemployed and have no income, while husband have an unstable job as a grab driver. They have 3 young children (5y/o, 3 y/o, and 8 mths old) and faces financial difficulties. Mother is also diagnosed with mental health issues (anxiety & depression) which adds on to caregiver stress. The family is in urgent need of diapers (Any brand, size S and M) for her 8 months old and 3 years old child.

passiton.name: Applecrumby® SlimDry⁺ Diapers size XL
passiton.description: Giving Applecrumby® SlimDry⁺ Diapers mini packs (pack of 10 diapers) in xl.

name: Single-size Mattress
description: Client lives in a rental flat and has 3 young children who are currently using bedding that is worn and no longer in suitable condition. This may be affecting their overall health, quality of rest, and school attendance. We are therefore reaching out to seek support from anyone who may be able to provide the family with 3 single mattresses. These items would help improve the children’s sleeping conditions, contributing positively to their overall well-being and daily functioning.

contact.org: Care Corner Family Service Centre - Admiralty
contact.name: Shanell Tan

name: diapers
description:
My client, a 69-year-old lady, uses Tena L-size plus stick-type diapers throughout the day and requires changing 3 to 4 times daily. She would greatly appreciate any assistance from donors who are willing to contribute diapers to support her daily needs.

Thank you very much for your kindness and support. If you have any enquiries regarding this donation, please feel free to contact me at lauleepai@fycs.org or call/WhatsApp me at 97266001.

Thank you once again.

contact.org: Fei Yue Cluster Support (CCK/ Bukit Panjang)

name: Clothes
description:
The client is a stroke survivor and she lives with her husband, who is the sole breadwinner of the family. They live in a 2-room HDB rental flat. 

She needs new cotton tee-shirts and knee-length shorts (with rubber waistband), as the tee-shirt she is wearing is already torn at the sleeve. 

She wears size XL for both tee-shirts and knee length shorts.

passiton.name: Baby girl clothes (12-18 months)
passiton.description: Loved baby girl clothes and shoes (12-18 months)
passiton.location: Ardmore, Balmoral, Bukit Timah, Grange Road, Holland Road, Orchard Boulevard, Tanglin

passiton.name: Baby boy clothes
passiton.description:
Appreciate if item can be self collected

Some well used baby/toddler clothes including long pants and long sleeve. 
These are well used hand-me-downs, no brand. Some may have light stains, frays but still wearable. Take only if u don't mind and also to help with recycling and helping the environment. 
Size vary from 90 to 110 (18m ~  3yo)

passiton.name: 0-6 month baby clothes
passiton.description: Huge bag of baby clothes, 0-6 months. Includes short sleeved and long sleeved vests, t shirts, sleep suit, hats, shorts, large muslin and a stretchy wrap baby carrier. Some soft booties not shown in photo also included.

name: wheelchair
description:
seeking a self-propelled wheelchair for a single elderly lady who is still able to move independently and push herself.

Shopee is selling around $150. If anyone has one available for donation, it would greatly help to support her mobility and daily activities. 

delivery arrangements will be on donor as elder is unable to collect herself.

Please feel free to WhatsApp me at 88003073 for more details.

Thank you in advance for your kindness and support.

contact.org: Hua Mei Care Management Service of TSAO Foundation
contact.name: Ryan Sim
